schedule.description: Story 2 — Game 3 preview, Rea vs Webb

stories.title: Cubs 6, Giants 1 — PCA First-Pitch HR, Brown Wins Third

x_posts.label: Post 1
x_posts.text:
Pete Crow-Armstrong homered on the FIRST PITCH of the game.

Cubs went on to beat the Giants 6-1. Ian Happ and Pedro Ramírez added solo shots. Ben Brown went 5 innings, 1 run, picks up win No. 3. Cubs lead the series 2-0.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW

stories.title: Game Preview — Rea vs Webb, 2:10 PM CT on ABC

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
Cubs go for the sweep this afternoon at Oracle Park. 2:10 PM CT on ABC.

Colin Rea (5-4, 5.19 ERA) vs Logan Webb (3-4, 3.88 ERA) — the Giants' ace finally shows up in Game 3.

Cubs lead the series 2-0. Let's finish it.

#Cubs #GoCubs #FlyTheW

stories.title: Bold Take — Cubs on the Sweep

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
The Giants are 28-43. The Cubs have outscored them 11-2 in this series.

Win today and this is a road sweep of one of baseball's worst teams. That's how you build a wild card resume in June.

Get it done.

#Cubs #GoCubs #MLB

stories.title: Standings — Cubs 37-34, Wild Card Is the Conversation

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Cubs at 37-34. Over .500. Still standing.

The NL Central is the Brewers' division to lose. Cubs know it too. The conversation now is the wild card — and at 37-34 in mid-June, that path is very much alive.

Win the games in front of you. Today counts.

#Cubs #NorthSiders #MLB

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
50 days to the August 3 deadline. Four starters on the IL.

Steele (elbow), Horton (Tommy John), Taillon (hamstring), Boyd (IL). Colin Rea is the No. 2 starter by default.

Jed Hoyer has said they're looking. The question is what it costs.

#Cubs #MLB #CubsBaseball

stories.title: Prospect Pipeline — Ayers, Hartshorn, Rojas, Sanders

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
The rotation is shorthanded up top, but the farm is cooking.

Owen Ayers and Josiah Hartshorn are on hot streaks at Double-A Knoxville. Jefferson Rojas has back-to-back 3-hit games. Will Sanders spun five scoreless for Iowa.

The cavalry is being built.

#Cubs #MLB #GoCubs
